signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below market forecasts of 2.4%.** | YES | MED

This marks the latest confirmed data release from Statistics Korea, showing contained price pressures amid global energy volatility, potentially influencing Fed assessments of international inflation trends during Waller’s recent Seoul speech on U.S. tarif
